description_long: This is a single low-top lace-up shoe, featuring a dark olive green upper with a matte finish and a brown rubber sole. The shoe has a rounded toe, three pairs of eyelets for lacing, and a slightly padded collar for comfort. The upper material appears to be canvas or a similar textile, while the sole is visibly thicker and made of rubber, providing durability and grip. The laces are flat and match the color of the upper, blending in seamlessly. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian and understated, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A dark olive green lace-up shoe with a brown rubber sole, matte finish, and understated design. It features a rounded toe, three eyelets, and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, lacing area, and the symmetry of the shoe's upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the low-top profile, three eyelets, and the brown rubber sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, padded collar, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's clean lines and sole thickness.
